title: koanophyllon tatei
intro: Koanophyllon tatei is a plant species of the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the Brazilian lettuce or Brazilian chamomile. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Koanophyllon tatei include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote better sleep. Herbal preparations of Koanophyllon tatei can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to calm the nervous system and promote overall well-being.
